# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting from this repository's Security tab when it is available.

If private vulnerability reporting is not available, contact the project maintainers privately using the maintainer contact listed in `composer.json`.

Include:

- a description of the vulnerability
- affected versions or commits
- reproduction steps or proof of concept
- expected impact
- any suggested mitigation

Maintainers should acknowledge the report privately, investigate before public disclosure, and coordinate a fix and release notes when needed.
